title: Chaos Erupts from the Capital to Udon
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Yasuie, Orochi, Unknown person #8 as Yasuie’s execution exposes Wano’s cruelty as chaos spreads from the Flower Capital to Udon prison.
scene: The capital erupts after Yasuie’s death while Big Mom’s arrival throws Udon prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My LORD... you are being too careless. How could you leave the castle with so few guards with you...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That Ronin... He was trying to kill me....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you think you're doing!? Think clearly!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why are our guns not working!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What is up with that Carpenter!!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't let you be left here on display!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Take the Shogun back to the castle!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kill every last person who dared to turn against me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A rebellion has started in the BAKURA district!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Shogun has ordered us to subdue them all at once!! You can kill them if you must!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Yasuie’s Execution and Udon Chaos storyline with 33 dialogue beats. Yasuie’s sacrifice and Big Mom’s arrival turn Wano’s hidden resistance into open chaos.
